name: Table Rock Trail
description: A popular trail with great views of the city.

name: Camelback Mountain Trail
description: A steep, rocky climb rewarded with sweeping desert views.

name: Angel's Rest Trail
description: A forested climb leading to a stunning overlook of the gorge.

name: Emerald Lake Trail
description: A scenic lakeside hike passing several alpine lakes.

name: Mist Trail
description: An iconic trail past waterfalls with breathtaking valley views.

name: Old Rag Mountain Trail
description: A challenging rock scramble with panoramic mountain views.

name: Bridal Veil Falls Trail
description: A rugged trail leading to Colorado's tallest free-falling waterfall.

name: Skyline to the Sea Trail
description: A long redwood forest trek stretching from the mountains to the coast.

name: Manitou Incline
description: A steep former railway incline offering an intense cardio workout.

name: Bear Mountain Loop
description: A forested loop trail with views of the Hudson River valley.

name: Zion Narrows Trail
description: A unique river hike through towering sandstone canyon walls.

name: Lost Lake Trail
description: An easygoing loop around a calm lake with mountain reflections.
